rows.label: qev025105_MSG0001
rows.name: What the hell is with this Ma-non named Aqual...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0002
rows.name:
Lying about being a BLADE...
Are you an acquaintance of this liar?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0003
rows.name:
That's why I showed you my resident registration data!
Are you saying that's a fake, too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0004
rows.name: Hmph... You people are experts at forging things like that, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0005
rows.name:
You're sorely mistaken if you think we know nothing.
We Earthlings won't be fooled by you Ma-non anymore![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_JNK0010
rows.name: Prove

rows.label: qev025105_SEL0011
rows.name: Prove that Aqual is a real BLADE.

rows.label: qev025105_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev025105_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about Duduma.

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0006
rows.name:
...You've definitely been deceived.
Ignorant of the cunning of those called Ma-non... yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0007
rows.name: ...That's enough, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0008
rows.name:
More importantly, tell us about Duduma.
Once you tell us that, we'll leave right away, sa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0009
rows.name:
...You mean that dispute?
While I was waiting in line at Army Pizza,
she started complaining that I cut in line.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0010
rows.name:
I just taught her a little lesson about what happens
when you defy us Earthlings.
Hmph... What an arrogant Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0011
rows.name:
I don't know about any jumping or whatever,
but surely divine punishment fell upon her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0012
rows.name:
You Ma-non there...
If you keep getting in my way like this,
divine punishment will fall upon you eventually, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0014
rows.name:
Don't ever speak to me again, got it?
Just hearing the squeaky voices of you Ma-non
makes me want to twist you to death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0015
rows.name:
How should I put this... He definitely seems like he has
enough motive to kill a Ma-non, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'd stand out if I went...
Could you tail after him for me, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025105_SEL0031
rows.name: Undertake the task and tell him to leave it to you.

rows.label: qev025105_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025105_SEL0041
rows.name: State that this is a job Aqual should do.

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0017
rows.name:
Not a single complaint...
You really are a wonderful partner, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0018
rows.name:
You're quite an inflexible person, ne.
Come on, look at the situation... ne! I'm counting on you, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0019
rows.name:
He hates Ma-non that much,
so if I even get a little close to him, I'd be found out, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Will you do it?
I'll go around questioning people on my end, sa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Alright!
Then it's time to depart, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025105_MSG0022
rows.name:
There's a park over that way,
so I bet he's around there, ne.[ST:wait ]
